revisions.*: Because "rvslots" was not specified, a legacy format has been used for the output. This format is deprecated, and in the future the new format will always be used.

'''5-3-245

Carrier emitted at a power level between 6 dB and 32 dB below the peak envelope power and preferably between 16 dB and 26 dB below the peak envelope power.

Reference: C.C.I.R.

{{IALAFooter}}

{{languages|Reduced carrier}}
